thoughts: I'm fascinated by the vastness and complexity of the ocean. The fact that it covers 70% of Earth and is home to so many different types of organisms is mind-boggling. I'm intrigued by the different zones of the ocean, from the surface to the deep water, and how different organisms adapt to these environments. The idea that some organisms can survive without sunlight, using chemicals from deep inside the Earth, is especially fascinating. I'm also curious about the various types of sea life, from ...
